description: Small baseline diff with metadata, hunks, and mixed change kinds.
Mixed scripts and bidi markers to guard line-map determinism.
diff:
diff --git a/src/i18n.txt b/src/i18n.txt
index 3333333..4444444 100644
--- a/src/i18n.txt
+++ b/src/i18n.txt
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
-Hello world
+Hello שלום ‮abc‬
+Notes: Привет 你好
 Context keeps baseline stable
